overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through misty grasslands during golden hour. The character traverses tall grass fields, passes a wooden cart, moves through white pampas grass, and follows a dirt path into a forest as the sun sets ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland field with distant tree line

events.description: white fox runs across the field from left to right behind the character
approaching wooden cart on the right side of the field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the setting sun, sword visible on back

notable_agents.action: white fox running quickly across the grass from left to right

entered.detail: dense green tall grass swaying in the wind, filling the foreground
old wooden wagon with large spoked wheels sitting abandoned in the field
dense tree line silhouetted against the bright golden sunset

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through an open grassland during golden hour, with dense green grass swaying in the foreground. A white fox darts across the field behind the character, and an old wooden cart becomes visible ahead on the right as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense white pampas grass field with small water stream

events.description: passing the wooden cart on the right and entering area with white pampas grass
vegetation transitions from green grass to tall white pampas grass plumes

agents.ego_description: walking through tall white reeds with sunlight illuminating the feathery grass plumes

entered.detail: tall white feathery grass plumes glowing in the golden sunlight
narrow waterway reflecting the golden light, visible between grass patches

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden cart and enters a field of white pampas grass that glows in the backlighting. The green grass shifts to the left side of the frame while white feathery plumes fill the center, and a small stream becomes visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest dirt path with trees lining both sides

events.description: stepping from grass onto dirt path entering the forested area
sun rays become more pronounced through the tree canopy creating god rays

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path deeper into the forest with trees on both sides

entered.detail: narrow earthen trail winding through the forest with patches of sunlight
tall trees with green foliage lining the left side of the path
tall trees with green foliage lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open grassland onto a dirt path that winds through a forest. Trees line both sides of the trail, creating a semi-enclosed space with dramatic sun rays filtering through the canopy. The white pampas grass and open field fall behind as the path leads deeper into the wooded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open, golden-hour grassland that gradually narrows into a sun-drenched forest. It begins with the samurai traversing dense green grass as a white fox darts across the field and an old wooden cart appears on the right. As the character passes the cart, the landscape shifts into a field of glowing white pampas grass with a small stream appearing to the right. The scene then transitions from the open plumes onto a winding dirt path, where the wide horizon is replaced by a semi-enclosed canopy of trees. Finally, the camera follows the trail deeper into the woods as dramatic sun rays filter through the branches, leaving the open fields behind.
